_comment: Per-profile withdrawal strategy. Merged on top of economicglobal.json — profile keys win on conflict.

withdrawal_sequence._comment_good: Good market: drain TRAD_IRA first to reduce RMD timebomb while assets are up. Roth always last — tax-free growth forever.
withdrawal_sequence._comment_bad: Bad market (conversion OFF): bucket strategy — bonds first, protect depressed equities from forced sale.
withdrawal_sequence._comment_bad_conv: Bad market (conversion ON): convert TRAD->Roth cheaply while assets are depressed. Use brokerage bonds to fund living expenses + conversion tax bill.

readme.purpose: Per-profile withdrawal sequencing strategy. Merged on top of economicglobal.json — profile values win on any conflict. Only put things here that differ from global defaults.
readme.tax_note: Withdrawal sequence determines WHICH account is drained but taxes are always computed on the full income stack and debited from brokerage separately. Sequence choice is a tax efficiency decision: draining TRAD first generates more ordinary income (higher bracket usage) but reduces future RMD burden; draining Roth last preserves the most tax-free growth.

withdrawal_sequence.purpose: Controls which accounts to draw from first in good vs bad markets. Earlier entries are drained first.
withdrawal_sequence.account_tokens: Use account names from allocation_yearly.json. For brokerage sub-buckets: 'BROKERAGE-1:equities' or 'BROKERAGE-1:bonds'. Plain 'TRAD_IRA' means all TRAD_IRA accounts drawn proportionally by balance.
withdrawal_sequence.order_good_market: Withdrawal order when portfolio is above the bad_market drawdown threshold in economicglobal.json.
withdrawal_sequence.order_bad_market: Withdrawal order when portfolio is below the drawdown threshold and Roth conversion is OFF. Typically bonds first to protect depressed equities from forced sale.
withdrawal_sequence.order_bad_market_with_conversion: Withdrawal order when portfolio is below threshold and Roth conversion is ON. TRAD first opportunistically converts at low asset prices; brokerage bonds fund living expenses and the conversion tax bill.
withdrawal_sequence.tira_age_gate: Age below which TRAD_IRA withdrawals incur 10% early withdrawal penalty. IRS rule, default 59.5. Simulator enforces brokerage-only withdrawals below this age regardless of sequence setting.
withdrawal_sequence.roth_last_resort: true = never draw from Roth unless all other accounts are fully exhausted. Preserves tax-free compounding as long as possible.
